creator: metaf2xml@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Created attachment 158766
patch to update science/metaf2xml to 1.57

Attached a proposed patch to upgrade the port for science/metaf2xml to 1.57. The patch has the following changes:

- bump PORTREVISION to 1.57 (distinfo, Makefile)
- add LICENSE, LICENSE_COMB (Makefile)

Please apply the patch. Thanks!
